headline: A Look At Pembina Pipeline (TSX:PPL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Pembina Pipeline triggered overview Pembina Pipeline (TSX:PPL) has been drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing modest shifts over the past week and month while posting stronger total returns over the past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for Pembina Pipeline. After a softer 1-day and 7-day share price return, Pembina Pipeline’s CA$61.40 share price still reflects strong momentum, with a 17.02% 90-day share price return and a 26.24% 1-year total...
